action.reasoning:
Observation: I have ~7.6h and 13 iters left. Local LPIPS ~0.60 on val with various modes. Need to fix render failures and submit eval. The shape mismatch is from the renderer's internal NaN filtering. Let me fix get_rays_for_c2w to avoid NaN and also try the world mode which is theoretically most correct, and submit eval.

Analysis: Render failures (e.g. 65476 vs 65536) likely come from NaN in rays or the rays_valid mask being applied inconsistently. Looking at TSR's nerf_renderer code, when triplane is 3D (not batched), it goes into _forward which uses chunk_batch over rays_valid filtered points. Could be a numerical issue. Let me set chunk_size smaller to be safe, and submit eval with mode=neg_az (best so far).

Decision: Submit eval with current code, mode=neg_az.
action.command: cd /tmp && rm -rf local_eval2 && mkdir -p local_eval2/subset && for d in $(ls $RAB_DATA_DIR/val | head -5); do cp -r $RAB_DATA_DIR/val/$d local_eval2/subset/; done && cd /workspace && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/local_eval2/subset --output /tmp/local_eval2/preds.json --mode neg_az
